overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an industrial urban district. The character moves along sidewalks and through parking lots beneath elevated highways, passing steam vents, neon storefronts, and industrial warehouses in a dystopian city environment.

events.description: green van drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a red brick industrial building, approaching an elevated highway

notable_agents.action: green van driving past on the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large industrial building with green-trimmed windows and metal fire escapes
complex network of industrial pipes and metal walkways lining the opposite street side
massive concrete and steel highway structure crossing above the street ahead
tall wooden utility pole with transformers and cables

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beside a red brick warehouse in an industrial district. Metal scaffolding structures line the opposite side of the street while an elevated highway overpass looms ahead. A green van passes by on the left as the character moves forward toward the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with steam vents and palm tree

events.description: turns right off the sidewalk into a parking lot area beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection, passing a palm tree and steam vents, then turning right into a parking lot

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk toward the intersection

entered.detail: tall palm tree growing from the sidewalk near the intersection
large pipe emitting white steam into the air
modern skyscraper with reflective glass facade visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk past a palm tree and industrial steam vents. The character approaches an intersection beneath the elevated highway, then turns right into an open parking lot area, leaving the main sidewalk behind as the overpass structure looms closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot beneath elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: moves from open parking lot into the covered area beneath the concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot past parked vehicles and neon-lit storefronts, moving deeper under the overpass

entered.detail: silver estate car parked in the lot
convenience store with bright neon signage and large digital advertisements
low-rise industrial structure with yellow facade and green trim
large illuminated advertising screen displaying product images

segments.scene_description: Walking through an asphalt parking lot beneath the elevated highway overpass. Parked cars and neon-lit convenience stores line the right side while industrial buildings stand to the left. The area becomes increasingly shaded as the character moves deeper under the concrete structure, with support pillars becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered parking area transitioning to outdoor seating plaza

agents.ego_description: continuing through the parking lot toward an open area with outdoor seating visible ahead

notable_agents.action: two people walking together in the distance near the overpass pillars

entered.detail: massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above
outdoor seating with green umbrellas and tables under the overpass
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Moving through the covered parking area toward an open plaza with outdoor seating visible ahead. Concrete pillars of the overpass dominate the left side while distant neon signs and city lights illuminate the background. The ground shows scattered cardboard and debris as the character approaches the seating area with green umbrellas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a bright industrial street into the shaded depths of an urban overpass. It begins along a concrete sidewalk beside a red brick warehouse, passing metal scaffolding and a green van as the camera advances toward a looming highway intersection. As the character moves past a palm tree and hissing steam vents, the path shifts right, leaving the main sidewalk to enter an open asphalt parking lot. The scene then grows increasingly shaded as the camera pushes deeper beneath the concrete structure, passing parked cars and neon-lit convenience stores. Finally, the movement continues past massive support pillars and scattered debris, emerging toward an open plaza illuminated by distant city lights and green umbrellas.
